claim_bullets.bullet_text: Aetherbeasts are daemon world creatures, servants of daemons, rarely seen in material world (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.228-229)
Hellhounds have 1 in 6 chance to breathe fire in 5 meter radius (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.228-229)
Cerberi are three-headed hellhounds, with fire breath in 5 meter surrounding radius (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.228-229)

source_record_text: This section covers various daemon and underworld creatures from the Sword World RPG - Complete Edition, detailing their characteristics, abilities, and behaviors.
